arguments.file_text:
# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

| Item | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Scope | `advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx` |
| Projects converted | 5 (Web, Api, Core, Legacy, Tests) |
| Packages centralized | 7 unique packages |
| Shared props updated | `Common.props` (Microsoft.Extensions.Logging) |
| MSBuild properties inlined | `$(BlobsVersion)` → 12.24.0, `$(HostingVersion)` → 8.0.1 |
| Properties removed from | `Directory.Build.props` |

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (10.0.1). Core and Legacy now resolve 10.0.1 instead of their previous versions. This is a major version bump for Legacy (8 → 10) and a minor bump for Core (9 → 10).

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (12.24.0). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0. This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

### Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson

| Version | Condition |
|---------|-----------|
| 6.0.36 | `$(TargetFramework)` == `net6.0` |
| 8.0.11 | `$(TargetFramework)` == `net8.0` |

**Resolution**: Conditional `<PackageVersion>` entries in `Directory.Packages.props` — each TFM retains its original version. No version changes.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | TFM | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|-----|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged

| Project | TFM | Package | Version |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — The conversion succeeded with a clean build and restore. Three packages changed resolved versions due to alignment to the highest version:

- **System.Text.Json**: Core (9.0.0 → 10.0.1) and Legacy (8.0.5 → 10.0.1) — major version jump for Legacy
- **Azure.Storage.Blobs**: Legacy (12.19.0 → 12.24.0) — minor version bump

The Legacy project is most affected (2 packages changed, including a major version bump for System.Text.Json). Recommend running `dotnet test` and verifying Legacy project behavior.

No `VersionOverride` was used — all packages are fully centralized.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Test validation**: Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for the Legacy and Core projects which received version bumps.
2. **Legacy project — System.Text.Json major bump**: Review [System.Text.Json migration guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/standard/serialization/system-text-json/migrate-from-newtonsoft) for any breaking changes between 8.x and 10.x that may affect the Legacy project.
3. **Legacy project — Azure.Storage.Blobs minor bump**: Review [Azure.Storage.Blobs changelog](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.Blobs/CHANGELOG.md) for changes between 12.19.0 and 12.24.0.
4. **EOL target framework**: The `net6.0` target framework is out of support (NETSDK1138 warnings). Consider migrating Api and Legacy to `net8.0` or later.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

| Artifact | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `baseline.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion |
| `after-cpm.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion |
| `baseline-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project before conversion |
| `after-cpm-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project after conversion |
| `convert-to-cpm.md` | This report file |

MSBuild binary logs can be viewed with the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for detailed build analysis and troubleshooting.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior beyond build success. For the packages that changed versions (System.Text.Json, Azure.Storage.Blobs), review the release notes for those packages to understand any behavioral changes.

# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

| Item | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Scope | `advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx` |
| Projects converted | 5 (Web, Api, Core, Legacy, Tests) |
| Packages centralized | 7 unique packages |
| Shared props updated | `Common.props` (Microsoft.Extensions.Logging) |
| MSBuild properties inlined | `$(BlobsVersion)` → 12.24.0, `$(HostingVersion)` → 8.0.1 |
| Properties removed from | `Directory.Build.props` |

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (10.0.1). Core and Legacy now resolve 10.0.1 instead of their previous versions. This is a major version bump for Legacy (8 → 10) and a minor bump for Core (9 → 10).

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to highest version (12.24.0). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 instead of 12.19.0. This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

### Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson

| Version | Condition |
|---------|-----------|
| 6.0.36 | `$(TargetFramework)` == `net6.0` |
| 8.0.11 | `$(TargetFramework)` == `net8.0` |

**Resolution**: Conditional `<PackageVersion>` entries in `Directory.Packages.props` — each TFM retains its original version. No version changes.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | TFM | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|-----|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged

| Project | TFM | Package | Version |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — The conversion succeeded with a clean build and restore. Three packages changed resolved versions due to alignment to the highest version:

- **System.Text.Json**: Core (9.0.0 → 10.0.1) and Legacy (8.0.5 → 10.0.1) — major version jump for Legacy
- **Azure.Storage.Blobs**: Legacy (12.19.0 → 12.24.0) — minor version bump

The Legacy project is most affected (2 packages changed, including a major version bump for System.Text.Json). Recommend running `dotnet test` and verifying Legacy project behavior.

No `VersionOverride` was used — all packages are fully centralized.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Test validation**: Run `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior, especially for the Legacy and Core projects which received version bumps.
2. **Legacy project — System.Text.Json major bump**: Review [System.Text.Json migration guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/standard/serialization/system-text-json/migrate-from-newtonsoft) for any breaking changes between 8.x and 10.x that may affect the Legacy project.
3. **Legacy project — Azure.Storage.Blobs minor bump**: Review [Azure.Storage.Blobs changelog](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.Blobs/CHANGELOG.md) for changes between 12.19.0 and 12.24.0.
4. **EOL target framework**: The `net6.0` target framework is out of support (NETSDK1138 warnings). Consider migrating Api and Legacy to `net8.0` or later.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

| Artifact | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `baseline.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion |
| `after-cpm.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion |
| `baseline-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project before conversion |
| `after-cpm-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project after conversion |
| `convert-to-cpm.md` | This report file |

MSBuild binary logs can be viewed with the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for detailed build analysis and troubleshooting.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior beyond build success. For the packages that changed versions (System.Text.Json, Azure.Storage.Blobs), review the release notes for those packages to understand any behavioral changes.

data.content:
Conversion complete. Here's the summary:

**What was done:**
- Created `Directory.Packages.props` with 7 centralized packages and conditional `PackageVersion` entries for `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` (net6.0/net8.0)
- Removed `Version` attributes from all 5 project files and `Common.props`
- Inlined `$(BlobsVersion)` and `$(HostingVersion)` into `Directory.Packages.props` and removed them from `Directory.Build.props`

**Version changes (aligned to highest):**
| Project | Package | Before → After |
|---------|---------|----------------|
| Core | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 |

**Risk: Moderate** — Legacy has a major version bump for System.Text.Json. Run `dotnet test` to validate. Full details in `convert-to-cpm.md`.
